SELECT enum_first(NULL::mood) FROM (SELECT 'happy' AS mood_value) AS subquery;
SELECT enum_first(mood_value) FROM (SELECT value AS mood_value FROM test_enum WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_subquery;
WITH enum_data AS (SELECT 'happy'::mood AS mood_value UNION SELECT NULL::mood) SELECT enum_first(mood_value) FROM enum_data;
SELECT enum_first(mood_value) FROM (SELECT value AS mood_value FROM test_enum ORDER BY value) AS ordered_subquery;
SELECT enum_first(mood_value) FROM moods UNION SELECT enum_first(NULL::mood);
